name: CodersMCP
description: Consolidated file operations, symbol indexing, shell execution, and web fetch for Windows Node.js development
long_description:
CodersMCP replaces Windows-MCP and Codegraph with a single MCP server. It handles CRLF/LF line ending mismatches, multi-byte encoding, and consolidates file operations, symbol indexing, and shell execution into one process to reduce token overhead.

Tools: fs_read, fs_write, fs_replace, fs_search, graph_index, graph_explore, run, web_fetch.

tools.name: fs_read
tools.description: Read a file as UTF-8 text with optional line range

tools.name: fs_write
tools.description: Write content to a file. Preserves the existing file line endings by default (CRLF/LF), or override via line_endings

tools.name: fs_replace
tools.description: Replace first (and only) occurrence of old_str with new_str. Normalizes old_str/new_str line endings to match the file, preserves file line endings on write.

tools.name: fs_search
tools.description: Recursively search files for a pattern string or regex. Skips files over 2MB and binary files, caps results at 500 matches

tools.name: graph_index
tools.description: Index a project directory for symbol and function lookup

tools.name: graph_explore
tools.description: Query the symbol index with fuzzy name search

tools.name: run
tools.description: Execute a shell command with timeout (PowerShell on Windows, /bin/sh elsewhere)

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a static HTML/documentation page and return its content as Markdown. Does not execute JavaScript (no SPA support).
